Title: Mushoku Tensei: Jobless Reincarnation
Actors: Yumi Uchiyama, Tomokazu Sugita, Ai Kayano
Plot: A 34-year-old underachiever gets run over by a bus, but his story isn't over. Reincarnated as an infant, he'll embark on an epic adventure.
Language: Japanese, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, French, Italian, English, German
